biological_replicate: MC4100-wt and MC4100-ΔcobB E. coli strains were generated as described previously.
experimental_design: CobB regulation of PDH and KDH under different nutrient conditions
CobB regulates PDH and KDH under several growth conditions.
factor_value: we evaluated three nutrient sources that enter the TCA cycle via distinct pathways: (i) acetate, (ii) glucose, and (iii) glutamine.
